summary: Crystal-clear DTS surround recording captures a wonderful 1978 show with excellent audio fidelity.
review: Both reviewers give five‑star ratings, calling the concert wonderful and highlighting the crystal‑clear, immersive DTS mix. The recording quality is praised as pristine, providing an enjoyable listening experience even though no specific songs are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both the performance and the DTS sound quality; however only two brief reviews limit confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crystal‑clear surround (DTS) mix praised by reviewers; no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the show as wonderful but give no specific comments on set structure.
